log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Satyr — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Satyr — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Satyr — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
→ Satyr — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 11 vs DC 15]
Frost Giant attacks Satyr — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Satyr — Bardic Musician HP: 8/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Satyr — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Satyr — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Satyr — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Satyr — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
